title: geofencing — trait composition
description: One owned trait — `HasGeofence`. Any Eloquent model can use it to carry a fence. Ships a companion interface (`Geofenceable`) that models MUST implement so the evaluator can rely on a stable surface even when models override the trait's default column storage.

owned.description: Mixed into any Eloquent model. Adds column casts for the 5 fence columns (geofence_polygon, location_point, geofence_radius_m, geofence_accuracy_tolerance_m, geofence_enforcement_enabled), a `geofenceChecks(): MorphMany` relation, a `evaluateGeofence(EvaluateGeofenceData): GeofenceCheckResultData` helper, a `preflightGeofence(EvaluateGeofenceData): GeofenceCheckResultData` helper, `hasGeofencePolygon(): bool`, `hasGeofenceRadius(): bool`. Storage strategy: geometry columns live on the model's OWN table — added via the `$table->addGeofenceColumns()` blueprint macro in the consumer's migration.
usedBy: Any downstream model needing a fence — future examples: Branch (facilities module), Facility, Venue, Event, DeliveryZone, HomeAddress
abstract_methods_when_overridden: When the model's geometry lives elsewhere (linked spatial_features table, external service), override the corresponding method(s) on the Geofenceable interface directly: geofencePolygon(), locationPoint(), geofenceRadiusM(), geofenceAccuracyToleranceM(), isGeofenceEnforcementEnabled().

owned_interfaces.description: Stable surface the evaluator depends on. Every fenceable model MUST implement it. The HasGeofence trait provides the default implementation reading from the model's columns; models with non-standard storage override individual methods.
methods: geofenceableAlias(): string — returns the #[Geofenceable] attribute's alias
getKey(): string — Eloquent contract (already on Model)

framework.reason: On GeofenceCheck. GDPR / retention path only. Application code cannot update (immutability guard); soft-delete flows through runSoftDelete() bypassing the saving hook.

audit.reason: Only `created` events audited (rows are insert-only). auditInclude pins the fields that carry disputable meaning: result, mode, distance_to_fence_m, overridden_by_user_id, supersedes_check_id.

geofence_check.notes: NO BelongsToBranch — that trait no longer exists in this module. NO custom Filterable — read queries go through GeofenceCheckRepository. The MorphTo relationship to the fenceable + subject is declared directly on the model.

immutability_guard.description: GeofenceCheck::booted() registers a `saving` hook that throws RuntimeException when `$model->exists` is already true (i.e., an update on a persisted row). First-time INSERT is allowed because `exists` flips to true only after insert. Soft-delete flows through runSoftDelete() which does not fire the saving event, so retention still works.
immutability_guard.override_pattern: Overrides = new row with supersedes_check_id pointing at the original.
